---
title: "CB Insights"
page-layout: article
---

# CB Insights

## Description

Database tracking startups, investors, venture capital activity, funding rounds, acquisitions, and emerging industries. Useful for entrepreneurship, innovation, and technology market research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Technology & Innovation
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, Market Research, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, Market Research, Data Platform

## Access notes

Requires users to register for an account using a Yale email address. Note: Expert Intelligence reports are not available with academic or university accounts.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-cb-insights)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
